Billing Settings

The Billing tab of /settings (redirected from /settings/billing) controls the default GL accounts used on sales invoices, when billing periods start, the fallback payment term, and which NettMail/Unlayer template is used as the branded wrapper for billing emails. Invoice and reminder email content is managed separately under the Email Templates tab.

Default accounts

Three GL accounts can be configured as system-wide defaults for the billing module:

SettingNotes
Default receivable accountThe accounts receivable control account used on new sales invoices when the client has no default receivable account set. Must be an asset account.
Default bank accountThe bank account pre-filled in the payment recording form when a client pays a sales invoice.
Tax liability accountThe GL account used to post the VAT/GST liability on sales invoices.

All three default to null (unset). The billing module will work without them, but accounts must be selected manually on each invoice or payment until they are configured.

Billing period day

Sets the day of the month on which billing periods begin (default: 25). Used by the "Beginning of Next Billing Period" payment term rule and by recurring invoice schedules with a billing-period-based start day.

Default payment term

Applied to new sales invoices when neither the client nor the invoice itself specifies a payment term. Leave unset to require explicit selection on each invoice. See Payment Terms.

Base email template

An optional NettMail/Unlayer template used as the branded HTML wrapper for all billing emails (invoice sends and reminders). InvoiceEmailTemplateService::wrapInBaseTemplate() injects the compiled body HTML into the wrapper at the [email_body] placeholder (square brackets — not {{email_body}}, which Unlayer's drag-and-drop editor wraps in a <code> element). If base_email_template_id is null or the referenced template no longer exists, the compiled body is returned as-is.

The body is wrapped in a styled <div> before insertion, using the font and size configured via nettmail.email_body_style (defaults to Inter 16px). This matches the typography of the Quill editor in the Email Templates tab so the preview is representative.

Create the wrapper template in Emails › Templates, then select it here. See Email (NettMail).

BillingEmailTemplate model

Invoice and reminder email content is stored as BillingEmailTemplate records, not as NettMail templates or as scalar settings values. The model lives at App\Modules\Billing\Models\BillingEmailTemplate.

ColumnTypeNotes
typestringinvoice or reminder
namestringDisplay name shown in the Email Templates sidebar
subjectstringEmail subject line; supports {{shortcodes}}
bodytextHTML body (authored in Quill); supports {{shortcodes}}
offset_daysinteger or nullReminders only — business-day offset from due date; negative = before, positive = overdue
enabledbooleanDisabled templates are skipped by send and scheduler

BillingEmailTemplate::forInvoice() returns the first record with type = 'invoice'. There should be exactly one invoice template. Reminders are fetched via scopeReminder()->scopeEnabled() and matched by their offset_days to today's business-day distance from each invoice's due date.

Templates are seeded by BillingEmailTemplateSeeder. If no invoice template exists, InvoiceEmailTemplateService::render() throws a RuntimeException.

Email shortcodes

The following {{shortcodes}} are available in both subject and body:

ShortcodeDescription
{{invoice_number}}Invoice reference (e.g. INV-2026-00042)
{{amount}}Invoice total with currency symbol
{{amount_outstanding}}Balance still owed (partial-payment aware)
{{due_date}}Payment due date (e.g. 30 Jun 2026)
{{client_name}}Client display name
{{company_name}}Your company name from CompanySettings
{{invoice_url}}Direct link to the invoice in the client portal
{{reference}}The invoice reference — empty string when not set

BillingSettings reference

KeyTypeDefault
billing_period_dayinteger (1–28)25
default_receivable_account_idUUID or nullnull
default_bank_account_idUUID or nullnull
default_payment_term_idUUID or nullnull
tax_liability_account_idUUID or nullnull
base_email_template_idUUID or null (NettMail Unlayer template)null
